name: GSVA_score
description: Gene Set Variation Analysis (Hänzelmann 2013): turn an expression matrix (genes x samples) into a label-free gene_set x sample pathway-activity matrix. Unlike ssGSEA, GSVA first converts each gene to a kernel-CDF quantile across samples, then runs a symmetric KS walk with a max-deviation difference score (mx_diff), giving signed scores centered near zero (positive = set up-regulated in that sample vs the cohort). Pure-compute (no R); supply log-scale expression + gene sets from MSigDB/Enrichr.

expression.description: {gene: [value_per_sample, ...]} — a genes x samples expression matrix on a continuous (e.g. log-normalized) scale.

samples.description: Sample names (same order as the per-gene value lists); defaults to sample_1..

gene_sets.description: {set_name: [gene, ...]} collection to score. Alternative to gene_set.

gene_set.description: A single gene set (list of gene symbols).

tau.description: Rank-weighting exponent in the random walk (default 1.0, the GSVA standard).

mx_diff.description: True (default) = ES_pos+ES_neg difference score (signed, bimodal, GSVA default); False = classic single max-deviation KS statistic.
